subject: chore(theme): switch defaults to lofi/black
body:
Change default light theme from nord to lofi and default dark theme
from night to black. Updates CSS @plugin defaults, flash-prevention
script, meta theme-color tags, and PWA manifest colors to match.

Tags: theme, daisyui, config
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
